semantic.role: Internal Markdown formatter for knowledge graph diagnostics within the view subsystem.
responsibilities: Load diagnostic JSON files from the .spine/view/data/ directory using fs and path.
Compute and format dependency edge compliance ratios into Markdown summary tables.
Format cycle dependency data (ID, modules, length) into a Markdown table with proper escaping.
Format dead code module entries into a Markdown table.
Provide escapeMarkdownTableCell utility to safely wrap values for Markdown table cells.
invariants: Input data must conform to the diagnostic JSON schema (KGNode, edges, cycles, deadCode).
Markdown output must be valid GitHub-flavored Markdown with properly escaped table cells.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide reusable Markdown formatting utilities for view producers that render knowledge graph diagnostic data into human-readable artifacts.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: This file is part of the view subsystem rebuild; the recent commit removed legacy CLI aliases and rebuilt docs, which may have affected the view data paths or formatting expectations.
